calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Fox for Andrea Leung (Administrator).

The Court stated that the Tennessee property is an issue, that it can not order the Administrator not to pursue the probate in Tennessee and that it can not require her to do so. Ms. Fox raised the issue of the California probate proceeding without the Tennessee ancillary proceeding, and stated that she can write a letter to each of the Beneficiaries to see if anyone would be interested in purchasing or dealing with the Tennessee property. The Court denied the request to distribute Mr. Moore's share to his Special Needs Trust. The accounting petition/fee request was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
